meta.purpose: LLM prompt to generate an Astro static page for PS5 repair services

constraints.rendering: Static HTML only — zero client-side JavaScript unless explicitly marked as `client:load` island
constraints.styling: Tailwind CSS using semantic design tokens from the provided CSS variables. NEVER use raw color values (no `bg-blue-500`, no `text-white`). Use `bg-primary`, `text-foreground`, `bg-muted`, etc.
constraints.fonts: Inter via Google Fonts, loaded in <head> with `font-display: swap`
constraints.icons: Inline SVG only — no icon library runtime. Copy SVG paths from Lucide (https://lucide.dev). Each icon must have `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"`.
constraints.images: All `` tags MUST have `alt`, `width`, `height`, and `loading="lazy"` (except hero which uses `loading="eager"`). Use Astro `` component where possible.
constraints.links_internal: Standard `<a href="/path">` — NO client-side router. All internal links must start with `/`.
constraints.links_external: All external `<a>` tags MUST have `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.
constraints.accessibility: All interactive elements must be keyboard-accessible. Use semantic HTML (`<nav>`, `<main>`, `<section>`, `<article>`, `<footer>`). Buttons must have visible focus rings.
constraints.accordions: Use native `<details>` + `<summary>` elements. NO JavaScript accordions.
forbidden: useState, useEffect, or any React hooks
Any content not present in this JSON

page.metaTitle: PS5 Repair Winnipeg | PlayStation 5 Fix | Mobile Tech Lab
page.metaDescription: PS5 repair in Winnipeg. Overheating, HDMI port, disc drive, DualSense controller repair for PlayStation 5. Console repair specialists.
page.heroDescription: PS5 overheating? HDMI not working? DualSense drifting? We're Winnipeg's PlayStation 5 repair specialists. HDMI port damage is the most common PS5 issue we repair—our technicians perform precision board-level micro-soldering.

services.name: Overheating Repair
services.description: PS5 overheating? We fully disassemble, deep clean cooling channels, and apply high-performance thermal paste.

services.name: HDMI Port Repair
services.description: Precision board-level micro-soldering to restore broken HDMI ports, damaged pads, and trace damage.

services.name: Disc Drive Repair
services.description: Fix disc reading issues, stuck discs, and drive replacements.

services.name: DualSense Repair
services.description: Fix stick drift, adaptive trigger issues, and buttons on DualSense.

services.name: SSD Upgrade
services.description: Install larger NVMe SSD storage for more PS5 games.

services.name: Display & Power Issues
services.description: PS5 turns on but no display, blue light blinking, console shuts off randomly, not powering on.

advantage_pillars.title: PlayStation Specialists
advantage_pillars.description: Winnipeg's PS5 and DualSense controller repair experts.

advantage_pillars.title: Overheating Experts
advantage_pillars.description: Thermal paste replacement and cooling system specialists.

advantage_pillars.title: Console Repair Pros
advantage_pillars.description: HDMI port micro-soldering and board-level repairs. Many can be completed same day.

advantage_pillars.title: Warranty on Every Repair
advantage_pillars.description: Lifetime warranty on most PS5 and controller repairs.

advantage_pillars.title: Precision Board-Level Repair
advantage_pillars.description: We perform micro-soldering repairs under magnification.

model_categories.title: DualSense Controllers
model_categories.description: Stick drift, trigger, and charging port repairs.

models_description: We repair all PlayStation 5 models including disc and digital editions, plus DualSense controllers and PSVR2.

pricing_micro_copy.costDriver: PS5 repair costs depend on the issue. Sony's PS5 support centre provides troubleshooting guides.
pricing_micro_copy.priceShock: Many customers are surprised that console repairs can approach a significant portion of the device's value. iFixit's PS5 teardown reveals the internal layout.
pricing_micro_copy.advisory: If the repair cost doesn't make financial sense, we'll explain alternatives including trade-in options.
pricing_micro_copy.fallback: Your game saves are typically backed up, so data loss is rarely a concern.

faqs.question: Can you fix PS5 overheating in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: Yes! We clean dust buildup, replace thermal paste, and ensure proper cooling.

faqs.question: Do you repair DualSense controller stick drift?
faqs.answer: Yes, we repair analog stick drift and adaptive trigger issues, usually within an hour.

faqs.question: Can you fix HDMI port issues on PS5?
faqs.answer: Yes, HDMI port replacement is a specialty—we use micro-soldering.

faqs.question: Do you upgrade PS5 storage?
faqs.answer: Yes, we install larger NVMe SSDs in your PS5.

faqs.question: Can you fix disc drive problems?
faqs.answer: Yes, we diagnose and repair disc drive issues.

faqs.question: How much does PS5 HDMI repair cost in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: HDMI repair costs depend on the extent of motherboard damage. We provide a clear quote after diagnosing.

faqs.question: Is PS5 HDMI repair done the same day?
faqs.answer: Many HDMI repairs can be completed the same day. Rush service guarantees same-day turnaround.

faqs.question: Why does my PS5 overheat?
faqs.answer: Dust buildup and degraded thermal compound are the most common causes.

faqs.question: Do you offer warranty on PS5 repairs?
faqs.answer: Yes. We offer a lifetime warranty on most PS5 HDMI and controller repairs.

service_area_note: Serving all Winnipeg neighborhoods. Also serving customers from Thompson, MB. Walk-ins welcome or book online.

locations.name: St. Vital Centre

validation_checklist: Page has exactly ONE <h1> tag matching the `page.h1` field
All services render with inline SVG icons, not an icon library import
All FAQ items use <details>/<summary>, not JS accordions
All external links have target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'
All three JSON-LD blocks are injected in <head>
No React, Preact, or JSX runtime in the build output
Hero image has loading='eager'; all other images have loading='lazy'
Page renders fully without JavaScript enabled
All color classes use Tailwind semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, etc.)
Phone links use tel: protocol; SMS links use sms: protocol
Section IDs match table_of_contents entries for anchor navigation
No placeholder content — every string comes from this JSON
